title: Issue 1969 state-delta-first operating loop
lane_outcome: Make ordinary AW operating-loop packets state-delta-first for issue #1969 across startup, implementation, report/continuation, and shipped skill adoption.
purpose_for_parent: Close the #1969 parent by landing all child slices #1970-#1974 as an ordered stack, with proof that the loop exposes current decision, message economy, continuation capsule, evidence bundle, and skill guidance without prompt-prose classifiers.
technical_strategy: Add shared state-delta packet builders in reporting_support, project them through ordinary start/implement/report surfaces, then update the shipped operating-loop skill to consume those packets. Keep packet shape compact, selector-friendly, and derived from existing structured state such as ordinary decision packets, proof state, communication contract, and continuation state.
technology_choices: existing skill registry and payload mirror

slice_sequence.title: #1970 current-decision packet
slice_sequence.purpose_for_lane: Expose current_decision packets in ordinary workflow outputs. Branch: codex/1969-01-current-decision.

slice_sequence.title: #1971 message-economy contract
slice_sequence.purpose_for_lane: Expose message_economy triggers alongside communication_contract. Branch: codex/1969-02-message-economy.

slice_sequence.title: #1972 continuation capsule
slice_sequence.purpose_for_lane: Expose continuation_capsule state for cheap resume/recheck. Branch: codex/1969-03-continuation-capsule.

slice_sequence.title: #1973 evidence bundles
slice_sequence.purpose_for_lane: Expose evidence_bundle packets for evidence-seeking decisions. Branch: codex/1969-04-evidence-bundles.

slice_sequence.title: #1974 operating-loop skill adoption
slice_sequence.purpose_for_lane: Update shipped workspace-operating-loop skill and registries for state-delta behavior. Branch: codex/1969-05-operating-loop-skill.

acceptance_boundary: The lane is complete only when the stacked branches/PRs together satisfy #1969 and all child issue acceptance criteria, with tests proving compact packets and skill discovery while preserving proof, residue, next action, and honest closure.
proof_strategy: Run changed-path AW proof selection, focused CLI tests for start/implement/report/skills packet exposure, summary/doctor planning checks, and a real CLI sample showing compact state-delta packets without broad always-on dumps.
notes: Stack order follows child issues so each PR can be reviewed independently while the final branch closes the parent lane.
